docs.title: Express.js Official Documentation
docs.description: Fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js. Official site covers guides, API reference, middleware, and resources for v4 and v5.

docs.title: Express Routing Guide
docs.description: Comprehensive guide to route paths, parameters, handlers, and response methods.

docs.title: Express Middleware Guide
docs.description: How to use application-level, router-level, error-handling, built-in, and third-party middleware.

docs.title: Express v5 API Reference
docs.description: Complete API documentation for Express v5, including application, request, response, and router objects.

docs.title: Express v4 API Reference
docs.description: Complete API documentation for Express v4, the long-term stable version widely used in production.
